name: Oriental Spaghetti
recipeIngredient: and cut into strips (¼ inch x 1-½ inches)
¾ cup Thinly sliced green onions
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the spaghetti according to package directions and drain.
2. In a bowl, mix 1 tablespoon of sesame oil with 2 tablespoons of soy sauce.
3. Toss the warm spaghetti with this mixture and set aside.
4. Steam snow peas for 2 minutes, then drain and cool under cold water.
5. Combine steamed snow peas, cucumber strips, sliced green onions, and parsley in a bowl.
6. In another bowl, mix remaining sesame oil, soy sauce, vinegar, mustard, and chili oil.
7. Toss the vegetable mixture with this sauce.
8. Finally, toss the vegetable sauce with the spaghetti mixture.
9. Serve cold.
Preparation time: 30 minutes
Serves 4 to 6
